---
name: Schema change
about: Propose an addition, modification, or removal in spec/schema.json
title: "[schema] "
labels: schema
---

## Proposed change

<!-- A clear statement of what you want changed. If you have a concrete shape in mind, paste it as a JSON snippet. -->

## Motivating use case

<!-- Why does this need to exist? What can a user or a tool do with this that it can't do today? Concrete examples land much better than abstract ones. -->

## Backwards compatibility

- [ ] This is a new optional field or property (backwards-compatible)
- [ ] This modifies an existing field (potentially breaking — please describe)
- [ ] This removes an existing field (breaking)
- [ ] This changes an enum (potentially breaking)

<!-- If this is breaking, explain why the break is worth it, and propose a migration path. -->

## Prior art

<!-- Does another spec (JSON Resume, LER-RS, Europass, Schema.org Person, vCard) do something similar? Linking to it helps the editor see precedent. -->

## Alternative shapes considered

<!-- Briefly: did you consider doing this with an existing field (extensions, longform, audiences, etc.) instead? Why doesn't that work? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Non-Goals](https://opencareerformat.org/v0.1/guide.html#non-goals) section
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar proposals
- [ ] I have considered whether `extensions` could carry this instead
